rationale: No events with direct impact on Portugal this cycle; Iran deal uncertainty mildly relevant via EU energy prices, gold price trend may touch savings indirectly.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal keeps EU energy price outlook uncertain, with mild indirect effects on Portuguese household energy costs and tourism-dependent economy.

top_events.title: Why is the price of gold trending down?
top_events.summary: Falling gold prices reflect shifting global risk sentiment; minor relevance to Portuguese savers and financial markets.

top_events.title: Warner Bros $111bn sale to Paramount approved by US justice department
top_events.summary: Major US media merger approved; negligible direct impact on daily life in Portugal.
